allow: Bash(bash -lc 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh >/dev/null 2>&1 && nvm use 22 >/dev/null 2>&1 && node --check public/app.js && node --check lib/triage.js && node --check lib/pr-form.js && node --check lib/similar.js && node --check lib/reply.js && echo "all JS OK"')

Bash(bash -lc 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh >/dev/null 2>&1 && nvm use 22 >/dev/null 2>&1 && for f in server.js public/app.js lib/triage.js lib/pr-form.js lib/similar.js lib/reply.js; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done && echo "all JS OK"')
